title: YTBer Modpack
description: This modpack collected the main mods for recording video and create content to your channel.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10ad4f0e465fcf48801b662ea29bc3617041fe2f_0.webp)

  Not big modpack for Minecraft Channel on YouTube and other platforms.

# 🎥 YouTuber's Tools – Modpack for Content Creators    
📸 A lightweight and optimized modpack made specifically for YouTubers, streamers, and Minecraft filmmakers. Perfect for smooth recording, cinematic shots, and stylish gameplay visuals!

---

## 💡 Key Features

- ⚡ **FPS Optimization** – Boost performance with top optimization mods.
- 🎬 **Flashback Mod** – Record, replay, and rewind gameplay without third-party tools.
- 🎥 **Cinematic Cameras** – Smooth, dynamic camera movements for cutscenes and creative shots.
- ✨ **Shaders & Visual Enhancements** – Beautiful visuals with minimal performance loss.
- 🕺 **Smooth Animations** – Realistic first-person movement, emotes, and more.
- 😎 **Cosmetic Mods** – Add accessories, cloaks, and visual flair for your character.
- 🧰 **Ready-to-Record Setup** – Pre-configured and clean for immediate use.

---

## 📦 What's Inside?

Here are some of the essential mods included:

- **Sodium** – Performance boosting
- **Flashback Mod** – In-game recording and replays
- **Freecam,CameraUtilis** – Create smooth camera paths and scenes
- **Iris + Shaders** – Compatible shader support for gorgeous visuals
- **Not Enough Animations** – Immersive character animations
- **Essentials Mod + Emotecraft + Other Cosmetics** – Visual customizations without affecting gameplay

---

## 🎯 Who is this for?

- YouTubers & streamers  
- Minecraft video creators  
- Machinima & animation makers  
- Players who want beautiful and cinematic Minecraft

---

## 🚀 Start Creating Today!

Install the pack, load up Minecraft, and jump straight into creating high-quality content. No extra setup needed — just pure creativity and smooth recording.

---

> 💡 Need help with thumbnails, mod suggestions, or additional features? Drop your ideas in the comments!
